title: Rivenhall Generating Station Extension Order 2024: correction of errors, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State to make corrections to the Rivenhall Generating Station Extension Order 2024.  Date of decision  8 April 2025  Company / location   Indaver Rivenhall LimitedHarlowEssex   Type of project  Development consent order for the increased capacity of an energy from waste electricity generating station / Correction of errors, Planning Act 2008 "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
